title: Complete UI redesign with modern, professional interface and enhanced visual design

requirements.text: Redesign the entire application interface with a modern, polished visual style featuring refined spacing, improved visual hierarchy, professional card layouts with elegant shadows and borders, and smooth animations and micro-interactions throughout all components

quotes: Modern, polished design with refined spacing and visual hierarchy
Professional card layouts with elegant shadows and borders

acceptanceCriteria: All components display refined spacing with consistent padding and margins
Visual hierarchy is clear with proper element sizing and prominence
Card components feature subtle shadows and elegant borders
Smooth CSS transitions are applied to interactive elements
Micro-interactions provide feedback on user actions (hover, click, focus states)

requirements.text: Enhance the color palette by refining the existing teal and slate theme with better contrast ratios, richer accent colors, and improved readability while maintaining the professional aesthetic

quotes: Enhanced teal/slate color palette with better contrast

acceptanceCriteria: Color contrast meets WCAG AA standards for text readability
Teal accent colors are more vibrant and visually appealing
Slate background tones provide better depth and layering
Color scheme remains cohesive across all components

requirements.text: Implement tab-based navigation system to separate the three workflow phases: Registration, Attendance Marking, and Records View, with clear visual indicators showing the active tab and current workflow phase

quotes: Tab-based navigation between Registration → Attendance Marking → Records View
Visual step indicators showing the current workflow phase
Distinct sections for each part of the process

acceptanceCriteria: Tab navigation clearly separates the three workflow phases
Active tab is visually distinct with highlighted styling
Tab labels are clear and descriptive (Registration, Mark Attendance, View Records)
Clicking tabs smoothly transitions between phases
Current workflow phase is always visible to the user

requirements.text: Add professional icons to each workflow phase and key actions throughout the application to improve visual communication and user guidance
acceptanceCriteria: Each workflow phase tab displays an appropriate icon
Key actions (register, mark attendance, filter, refresh) have clear icons
Icons are consistent in style and size across the application
Icons enhance usability without cluttering the interface

requirements.text: Refine typography throughout the application with strategic font weights, improved font sizes for better hierarchy, and enhanced readability for headers, body text, labels, and data displays

quotes: Refined typography with strategic font weights and sizes

acceptanceCriteria: Page titles use bold, larger font sizes for prominence
Section headers have appropriate weight and size for hierarchy
Body text is easily readable with proper line height and letter spacing
Form labels are clear and properly sized
Table and data text is legible and well-formatted

requirements.text: Redesign all buttons with modern styling including refined shapes, improved hover effects with smooth transitions, clear active states, and consistent sizing across the application

quotes: Modern button styles with polished hover effects

acceptanceCriteria: Primary action buttons have prominent, modern styling
Secondary buttons are visually distinct from primary buttons
Hover effects include smooth color transitions and subtle scale/shadow changes
Disabled button states are clearly indicated
Button sizing is consistent and appropriate for their importance

requirements.text: Improve form layouts in the registration and attendance components with clean organization, clear labels positioned consistently, visible validation states with helpful error messages, and better input field styling

quotes: Clean form layouts with clear labels and validation states

acceptanceCriteria: Form fields are properly aligned and spaced
Labels are positioned consistently above or beside inputs
Input fields have modern styling with focus states
Validation errors display clearly with helpful messages
Required fields are clearly indicated

requirements.text: Redesign the attendance records table with elegant styling including improved column headers, better row spacing, zebra striping or subtle row hover effects for readability, and modern table borders

quotes: Elegant table design for attendance records with better readability

acceptanceCriteria: Table headers are visually distinct with appropriate font weight and background
Row spacing provides comfortable readability
Alternating row colors or hover effects improve data scanning
Table borders are subtle and modern
Empty state is handled gracefully with a clear message

constraints: Do not modify the backend actor or data structures
Do not change the Internet Identity authentication implementation
Maintain existing functionality for webcam capture, person registration, attendance marking, and records filtering
Do not modify files in frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, useActor.ts, or frontend/src/main.tsx
Preserve the existing teal and slate color foundation while enhancing it
nonGoals: Changing the backend data model or API
Adding new features beyond visual redesign
Modifying the core attendance tracking functionality
